title: connarus cochinchinensis
intro: Connarus cochinchinensis, also known as the woodysperm or cochinchin woodysperm, is a plant species that belongs to the Connaraceae family. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Connarus cochinchinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused as a tea, and its dried roots and rhizomes are also used in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
